ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role assignment was last modified */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user logging in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of the login event */,
  "login_success" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the login was successful */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login attempt was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the login */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the login history entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_history" (
  "password_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the password */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password value */,
  "password_date" TEXT /* Date the password was set */,
  "password_strength" INTEGER /* Score indicating the strength of the password */,
  "password_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the password will expire */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the password history entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("password_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user affected by the audit event */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit event */,
  "audit_event" TEXT /* Description of the audit event */,
  "action_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the audit action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of audit action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the audit entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the application */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the application was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the application was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted permission */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being accessed */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last modified */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_permissions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)
